overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a blooming spring countryside at sunset. The character departs from a village edge with wooden houses, passes through fenced orchards with white-blossomed trees, walks by a dilapidated shack, and continues toward a bright golden sunset.

scene_state.functional_zone: village edge with wooden house and guards

events.description: Geralt walks past two NPC guards in red clothing standing near the house
exits the cobblestone village area onto the dirt orchard path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking away from the village along the cobblestone path, passing the guards

notable_agents.action: guard in red clothing standing near the wooden house entrance
guard in red clothing holding a spear by the fence

entered.detail: rustic wooden house with thatched roof and weathered planks
stone-paved village path with irregular cobbles
trees with white spring blossoms lining the exit from the village
wooden fence marking the boundary of the village property

segments.scene_description: Geralt begins at the edge of a rural village, walking past two stationary guards in red clothing near a wooden house. The cobblestone path leads toward an orchard with blooming white trees, transitioning from the built village environment to the open countryside.

scene_state.functional_zone: blooming orchard path with wooden fencing

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the purple sky and a visible moon
camera returns to normal walking view facing forward

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the blooming orchard, briefly looking up at the sky

entered.detail: unpaved dirt trail winding through the orchard with grass verges
rustic wooden split-rail fence lining the orchard path

segments.scene_description: Walking along the dirt path through the blooming orchard, Geralt briefly looks up at the purple sky where a moon is visible. The wooden split-rail fences line both sides of the path, and the village structures fall behind as the open countryside extends ahead.

events.description: dilapidated wooden shack comes into view on the right side of the path
Geralt passes the shack and continues uphill along the winding path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking past a dilapidated shack on the hillside, continuing along the dirt trail

entered.detail: small dilapidated wooden hut with broken roof and missing planks

segments.scene_description: The path leads toward a small abandoned wooden shack on the right, which Geralt passes closely. The terrain becomes more hilly with grassy slopes, and the orchard trees continue to line the winding dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: orchard path facing into golden sunset

events.description: sun becomes visible on the horizon, creating intense golden hour backlighting and lens flare
path becomes darker as Geralt walks directly toward the bright sunset glare

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking toward the setting sun through the blooming trees, silhouetted against the bright light

entered.detail: bright sun low on the horizon creating golden light and lens flare effects

segments.scene_description: Walking directly toward a brilliant golden sunset, Geralt is silhouetted against the bright light. The blooming orchard trees glow in the backlight, and the path ahead is illuminated with warm orange and purple hues as the sun sits low on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the structured edge of a rural village into a vast, glowing spring countryside at sunset. It begins on a cobblestone path past guards in red clothing and wooden houses, transitioning smoothly as the terrain shifts toward an orchard of blooming white trees. As the camera follows Geralt along a dirt path lined with split-rail fences, the village structures recede and the sky deepens into a purple hue where a pale moon is visible. The scene then winds past a small abandoned wooden shack and across hilly, grassy slopes, with the orchard trees continuing to frame the trail. Finally, the camera moves directly into a brilliant golden sunset, silhouetting the figure against a horizon bathed in warm orange and purple light.
